a1.core_gate: Gan>=21; 0.90<=Score<=1.60; Presence5=0; MaxFreq5<2; A1 hard-noise brake off
a1.volume_gate: Gan>=12; 0.70<=Score<=1.80; Presence5=0; MaxFreq5<2; A1 hard-noise brake off

x3.gate: repeat2<=4; previous maxfreq<=2; HOT21 sum 32-34; HOT21 max 11-14; no fallback
x3.tie_break: X3Score desc; HOT21 desc; Gan desc; code asc

roll7.target: Every rolling 7 draw sessions has at least 5 signal days
roll7.trigger: A1, X2 and X3 all A0 AND prior six sessions already contain at least two A0 signal-days

roll30.target: 25 signal days in every 30 draw sessions

x2_panel.qualified_action: Show and fund exactly the two codes of the qualified X2 exact rank-1 pair
x2_panel.fallback_action: Show exactly the two codes of the current rank-1 X2 pair with zero capital

x3_panel.qualified_action: Show and fund exactly the three codes of the qualified X3 exact basket
x3_panel.fallback_action: Show exactly the three codes of the current top-ranked X3 basket with zero capital

top_block.near_rule: Explicit NEAR/GẦN status, a conditionally close candidate, or X3 sum 31/35 near the 32-34 gate.
top_block.display_disclaimer: Tỷ lệ thắng chỉ là tham chiếu lịch sử cấp phương pháp, không phải xác suất riêng của từng mã và không bảo đảm kết quả.
top_block.real_money_rule: A1, X2 and X3 are independent. Every passing standard method receives its canonical stake; the same code is funded once at the highest applicable stake. ROLL7 is used only when all three standard methods are A0.

milestones.meaning: Conditional lower bound, never a guaranteed entry date

run_scope_at_both_times: write repository data files and Google Sheet import CSVs
publish website for the next draw
result_actions: recompute next-day A1, X2 and X3 independently
fund every passing standard method with cross-method dedupe
apply ROLL7 rescue30 only when all standard methods are A0
commit and publish with GitHub Pages
pipeline.source_access_failure_action: Preserve the last valid data/current.json; write failure only to data/automation-status.json; retry on the next scheduled run.
pipeline.invalid_fresh_dataset_action: A0 only when a newly fetched dataset itself fails the 27/27 or cross-source validation gate; never guess.
